## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Alex AI recruiting platform features and functionality to inform GrowthX's AI workflow content.](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Alex conducts 24/7 AI-powered video interviews, averaging 149 interviews/day for this client](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Platform integrates with major ATS systems, automates admin tasks, and provides detailed candidate reports](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Highly configurable interview process with multilingual support, cheat detection, and custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Demo showcased interview creation, candidate experience, and backend reporting capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

## Topics

### Alex Platform Overview

  - [24/7 interview availability, averaging 149 interviews/day for featured client](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Automates admin tasks: ATS updates, candidate communications, interview scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Integration with major ATS systems (Workday, SuccessFactors, Oracle Recruiting Cloud)](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Multilingual support (expanding based on client needs, e.g. adding Arabic for Saudi Airlines)](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Interview Creation Process

  - [Import job descriptions to auto-generate structured interviews](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Customizable questions, evaluation criteria, and scoring rubrics](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Options for video or phone interviews](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Configurable settings: interview length, retakes, persona, cheat detection](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Candidate Experience

  - [Practice interviews available before official submission](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Multi-step interview process with AI-driven conversation](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Candidate survey for feedback post-interview](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

### Backend Reporting & Analysis

  - [Detailed candidate reports generated in 1-2 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Video/transcript review with timestamp-linked snippets](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
  - [Cheat detection analysis (eye tracking, voice analysis, inconsistencies)](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
  - [Integration with ATS for candidate disposition](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)

### Workflow Automation

  - [Customizable workflows based on client ATS and processes](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [Automated actions based on candidate scores or status changes](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Integration with other tools (e.g. Outreach) for seamless processes](https://fathom.video/share/JvTHxizSCJUUtWMRCjEUDuPzzFiog99B?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
